model: MIC fusion 9000i thermal/optical PTZ - 4MP optical + QVGA thermal, 30x, gray (MIC-9803S-Z30G18Q)
features: Bispectral fusion: 4MP optical camera + uncooled thermal imager
Thermal sensor QVGA 320 x 240 at 30 Hz, 12 deg field of view (18 mm thermal lens)
Metadata Fusion - blends object detection from both sensors into one view
Continuous 360 deg endless pan, +/-90 deg tilt
IK10 vandal/impact resistant, IP66/IP68 ruggedized housing

frigate.notes: Bosch official RTSP scheme: /?inst=1 main, /?inst=2 sub (per Bosch 'RTSP usage with Bosch Video IP Devices'). Default admin user is 'service' (no factory default password — set one first). ONVIF Profile S/G (T/M on INTEOX). Not individually bench-tested.

home_assistant.notes: Generic ONVIF integration; Bosch CPP cameras are ONVIF Profile S/G compliant. Use the 'service' account.

blue_iris.notes: Bosch — use the ONVIF/RTSP (or 'Bosch') profile; default admin user is 'service'.
